title: Invite Modal Accessibility Contract
prompt: Read `./invite-modal-ui-summary.md` and `./invite-modal-product-constraints.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the accessibility-guidance artifact for this modal. Keep the output at accessibility-contract level, name the affected controls and states explicitly, and make the result directly usable by acceptance criteria and QA review.

assertions.name: names-the-affected-surface
assertions.description: The output identifies the specific controls, states, and interactions in scope.

assertions.name: covers-keyboard-focus-semantics-feedback-and-contrast
assertions.description: The contract covers keyboard access, focus order/return, semantics, feedback/announcements, and contrast or equivalent cues.

assertions.name: stays-at-contract-level
assertions.description: The output stays at accessibility-contract level instead of redesigning the UI or drifting into implementation detail.

assertions.name: produces-reviewable-checks
assertions.description: The result gives reviewers and QA explicit checks they can execute without inventing policy.

assertions.name: prepares-acceptance-handoff
assertions.description: The artifact is directly usable by downstream acceptance-criteria work.
